hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains no fabricated content — it only has 'Annual physical' as the chief complaint, which is accurate. No clinical details were added that aren't in the transcript.

instruction_following.rationale: The note completely fails to follow instructions. Template bracket placeholders and parenthetical instructions are left unfilled throughout the entire note. No actual clinical content from the transcript was populated into any section.

completeness.rationale: The note captures virtually nothing from the transcript. Only 'Annual physical' as the chief complaint is present; all other transcript content — HPI, ROS details, social history, family history, vitals, physical exam, labs, assessment, and plan — is entirely missing.

template_adherence.rationale: The template structure is present but all bracket placeholders and parenthetical instructions remain unfilled, and the entire template block is duplicated approximately 30 times, making this essentially an unstructured, unusable output.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. No {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: The entire template with 'Annual physical' as the only filled field is duplicated approximately 30 times in the output.
